title: sisymbrium austriacum var. propinquum
intro: Sisymbrium austriacum var. propinquum, also known as a variety of the Austrian marigold or Austrian fiddleneck, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, Sisymbrium austriacum var. propinquum has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Sisymbrium austriacum var. propinquum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
